title: Petco Health and Wellness Company (WOOF) Q1 2021 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Petco Health and Wellness Company (WOOF) Q1 2021 Earnings Call Transcript. Q1 2021 Results: Petco reported earnings per share of 17 cents adjusted versus 9 cents expected, and revenue of $1.4 billion versus $1.27 billion expected for the fiscal first quarter ended May 1, 2021. Key Performance Highlights: The company achieved record quarterly revenue of $1.4 billion, up 27% from Q1 the prior year with comparable sales growth of 28%. This marked the 10th consecutive quarter of comp growth. Business Segment Performance: Pet Care Centers delivered growth of 26%. Digital sales exceeded expectations with 21% growth. Services and vet delivered 63% year-over-year growth. Profitability: Top line growth translated into a 45% increase in adjusted EBITDA driven by gross margin expansion and operating leverage. Forward Guidance: The company beat Wall Street's expectations and raised their full-year forecast based on strong first quarter performance.
